scenarios.name: countdown surfaces only show occasions everyone can see

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_occasions__occasions (id, member_id, kind, title, event_month, event_day, event_year, visibility, notes, gift_idea, lead_days, source, source_ref, emoji, countdown, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'milestone', 'Disney trip', 3, 15, 2099, 'everyone', '', '', 7, 'manual', '', '🎢', 1, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_occasions__occasions (id, member_id, kind, title, event_month, event_day, event_year, visibility, notes, gift_idea, lead_days, source, source_ref, emoji, countdown, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'milestone', 'Proposal', 4, 2, 2099, 'private', '', '', 7, 'manual', '', '💍', 1, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_occasions__occasions (id, member_id, kind, title, event_month, event_day, event_year, visibility, notes, gift_idea, lead_days, source, source_ref, emoji, countdown, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'milestone', 'Dentist', 5, 9, 2099, 'everyone', '', '', 7, 'manual', '', '', 0, '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

SELECT id AS id, title AS title, printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', event_year, event_month, event_day) AS at FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE countdown = 1 AND (kind <> 'milestone' OR (event_year IS NOT NULL AND printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', event_year, event_month, event_day) >= date('now'))) ORDER BY at LIMIT 3
SELECT id AS id FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE countdown = 1 ORDER BY event_month LIMIT 3
SELECT id AS id FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE countdown = 1 AND visibility = 'everyone' ORDER BY event_month LIMIT 3

scenarios.name: private occasions are hidden from other members; shared ones are visible

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_occasions__occasions (id, member_id, kind, title, event_month, event_day, event_year, visibility, notes, gift_idea, lead_days, source, source_ref, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'gift', 'Surprise', 2, 14, NULL, 'private', '', 'a watch', 3, 'manual', '', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_occasions__occasions (id, member_id, kind, title, event_month, event_day, event_year, visibility, notes, gift_idea, lead_days, source, source_ref, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'birthday', 'Mom', 6, 21, 1959, 'everyone', '', '', 3, 'manual', '', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
UPDATE app_occasions__occasions SET gift_idea = 'leaked' WHERE id = ?
SELECT gift_idea FROM app_occasions__occasions WHERE id = ?
